1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Bilal calls the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Ibn Umm Maktum calls the adhan.' She said: He would descend while the other was ascending, and the gap between them was no more than the time it took one to come down and the other to go up.
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bilal mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makanlah dan minumlah hingga Ibnu Ummu Maktum mengumandangkan adzan.' Ia berkata: Yang satu turun sementara yang lain naik, dan jarak antara keduanya hanya seukuran yang satu turun dan yang lain naik.

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'How bad it is that you equate us with dogs and donkeys! I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ praying while I was lying stretched out in front of him, and when he wanted to prostrate he nudged my leg, so I drew it in, and then he prostrated.'
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Alangkah buruknya kalian menyamakan kami dengan anjing dan keledai! Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat sementara aku berbaring melintang di hadapannya, dan ketika beliau hendak bersujud beliau menyentuh kakiku, maka aku melipatnya, lalu beliau bersujud.'

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'What is forbidden through breastfeeding is the same as what is forbidden through birth.' And Abdullah ibn Abi Bakr reported from Amra from Aisha from the Prophet ﷺ similarly.
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang diharamkan karena persusuan adalah sama dengan yang diharamkan karena kelahiran.' Dan Abdullah bin Abi Bakr meriwayatkan dari Amra dari Aisyah dari Nabi ﷺ hal yang serupa.

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a woman spends from her husband's household without causing corruption, she receives her reward, and he receives the same for what he earned, and she receives it for what she spent, and the treasurer receives the same — without any of their rewards diminishing one another.'
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang wanita menafkahkan dari rumah suaminya tanpa berbuat kerusakan, ia mendapat pahalanya, suaminya mendapat yang serupa atas apa yang ia usahakan, dan ia mendapat pahala atas yang ia nafkahkan, dan bendahara mendapat yang serupa — tanpa mengurangi pahala satu sama lain.'

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah loves to meet him; and whoever hates to meet Allah, Allah hates to meet him, and death comes before the meeting with Allah.'
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang cinta bertemu Allah, Allah pun cinta bertemu dengannya; dan barangsiapa yang benci bertemu Allah, Allah pun benci bertemu dengannya, dan kematian mendahului pertemuan dengan Allah.'

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to sleep alongside the Messenger of Allah ﷺ under a single garment while I was menstruating. If something from me touched him, he would wash that spot and not move from his place, and he would pray in that garment.'
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa tidur bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di bawah satu selimut sementara aku sedang haid. Jika sesuatu dariku mengenai beliau, beliau mencuci tempat itu dan tidak berpindah dari tempatnya, lalu beliau shalat dengan pakaian itu.'

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss, or kiss her, while he was fasting. And she said: 'Which of you had more control over his desires than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?'
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium, atau menciumnya, sementara beliau sedang berpuasa. Ia berkata: 'Siapakah di antara kalian yang lebih mampu mengendalikan hasratnya daripada Rasulullah ﷺ?'

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to treat some of his family with his right hand and say: 'Remove the pain, O Lord of mankind, and heal, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no illness behind.'
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meruqyah sebagian keluarganya dengan tangan kanannya dan berdoa: 'Hilangkanlah penyakit, wahai Tuhan manusia, dan sembuhkanlah, karena Engkau adalah Penyembuh. Tidak ada kesembuhan kecuali kesembuhan-Mu, kesembuhan yang tidak meninggalkan penyakit.'

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When a woman spends from her husband's food' — and he mentioned its meaning — 'and neither of them diminishes the reward of the other.'
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang wanita menafkahkan dari makanan suaminya' — dan beliau menyebutkan maknanya — 'dan tidak seorangpun di antara keduanya yang mengurangi pahala yang lain.'

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a Jewish woman came and asked her for a gift of perfume, and Aisha gave it to her. The Jewish woman said something that troubled Aisha. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came, and Aisha mentioned it to him and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, is there punishment in the grave?' He said: 'Yes, they are punished in their graves with a punishment that the animals can hear.'
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita Yahudi datang dan meminta hadiah parfum darinya, dan Aisyah memberikannya. Wanita Yahudi itu mengucapkan sesuatu yang mengganggunya. Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ datang, dan Aisyah menceritakannya kepada beliau: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah ada azab kubur?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, mereka diazab di kuburan mereka dengan azab yang dapat didengar oleh binatang.'

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I said: O Messenger of Allah, for whom did you pray that they would be forgiven?' He said: 'Do you not know what I made a covenant with my Lord? I said: O Allah, whatever believer I revile, flog, or curse, make it a forgiveness, mercy, and blessing for him.'
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya: Wahai Rasulullah, untuk siapa engkau mendoakan ampunan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidakkah kamu tahu apa yang aku perjanjikan dengan Tuhanku? Aku berkata: Ya Allah, kepada orang mukmin manapun yang aku caci, cambuk, atau kutuk, jadikanlah itu sebagai ampunan, kesehatan, dan kebaikan baginya.'

12.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when some people turned away from what the Prophet ﷺ was permitted to do, and news of this reached him, he became angry, and the anger was visible on his face. He then said: 'What is wrong with people that they turn away from what Allah has permitted for me? By Allah, I am the most knowledgeable of them about Allah and the most fearful of Him.'
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika beberapa orang berpaling dari apa yang diizinkan bagi Nabi ﷺ, dan berita ini sampai kepada beliau, beliau marah, dan kemarahan tampak di wajah beliau. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Ada apa dengan orang-orang yang berpaling dari apa yang Allah telah izinkan bagiku? Demi Allah, aku adalah yang paling berpengetahuan di antara mereka tentang Allah dan yang paling takut kepada-Nya.'

13.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us the choice, and we chose him, and he did not count that as a divorce against us.'
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan, dan kami memilih beliau, dan beliau tidak menghitung itu sebagai talak atas kami.'

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during his final illness, the Prophet ﷺ took her hand and wiped himself with it while she was saying the supplication. Then he pulled his hand away from her and said: 'O Lord, forgive me and let me join the Highest Companion.' She said: That was the last of his words that I heard.
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dalam sakit terakhirnya, Nabi ﷺ mengambil tangannya dan mengusap dirinya dengannya sementara ia sedang membaca doa. Kemudian beliau menarik tangannya dari tangannya dan berkata: 'Ya Tuhanku, ampunilah aku dan pertemukanlah aku dengan Teman Tertinggi.' Ia berkata: Itulah kata-kata terakhir yang aku dengar dari beliau.

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a thief stole from her and she cursed him, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'Do not lighten his burden [by cursing him].'
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pencuri mencuri darinya dan ia mengutuknya, maka Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Jangan ringankan bebannya [dengan mengutuknya].'

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'Hand me the prayer mat from the mosque.' She said: 'I am menstruating.' He said: 'Your menstruation is not in your hand.'
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Ambilkan aku tikar shalat dari masjid.' Ia berkata: 'Aku sedang haid.' Beliau bersabda: 'Haidmu bukan di tanganmu.'

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Seek the consent of women regarding their private affairs.' It was said: 'But a virgin is too shy to speak.' He said: 'Her silence is her permission.'
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mintalah persetujuan wanita mengenai urusan privat mereka.' Dikatakan: 'Tetapi seorang perawan terlalu malu untuk berbicara.' Beliau bersabda: 'Diamnya adalah izinnya.'

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said while holding a garment with traces of saffron: 'When I die, wash this garment of mine and add two new garments to it, and shroud me in three garments.' They said: 'Should we not make them all new?' He said: 'No, it is only for decay.' She said: He died on Tuesday night.
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda seraya memegang pakaian yang ada bekas minyak wangi: 'Ketika aku wafat, cucilah pakaianku ini dan tambahkan dua pakaian baru padanya, lalu kafankanlah aku dalam tiga lapis kain.' Mereka berkata: 'Apakah tidak sebaiknya kita jadikan semuanya baru?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, itu hanya untuk pembusukan.' Ia berkata: Beliau wafat pada malam Selasa.

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Barira was freed, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave her the choice, and she chose herself. People used to give her charity and she would give it to them as a gift, so Aisha mentioned this to the Prophet ﷺ. He said: 'It is charity for her but a gift for you, so eat it.'
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Barirah dimerdekakan, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memberinya pilihan, dan ia memilih dirinya sendiri. Orang-orang biasa bersedekah kepadanya dan ia memberikannya kepada mereka sebagai hadiah, maka Aisyah menyebutkan hal ini kepada Nabi ﷺ. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah sedekah baginya tetapi hadiah bagimu, maka makanlah.'

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed witr at every part of the night, and his witr ended at the time of sahur.'
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan shalat witir di setiap bagian malam, dan witir beliau berakhir pada waktu sahur.'

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when they mentioned how hard someone was striving in worship, the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The most beloved of deeds to Allah is that which is done consistently, even if it is little.'
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika mereka menyebutkan betapa kerasnya seseorang bersungguh-sungguh dalam ibadah, Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Amalan yang paling dicintai oleh Allah adalah yang dikerjakan secara terus-menerus, meskipun sedikit.'

22.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ took a checkered cloak and gave back a Anbijaniyyah. They said: 'O Messenger of Allah, the checkered cloak is better than the Anbijaniyyah.' He said: 'I was being distracted by its pattern during prayer.'
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil jubah bermotif kotak dan mengembalikan jubah biasa. Mereka berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, jubah bermotif kotak lebih baik dari jubah biasa.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku teralihkan oleh motifnya saat shalat.'

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ grew old and became heavy, he would recite whatever Allah willed while seated. When thirty or forty verses of the surah remained, he would stand and recite them, then prostrate.'
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ menua dan menjadi berat, beliau membaca apa yang Allah kehendaki dalam keadaan duduk. Ketika tiga puluh atau empat puluh ayat dari surah itu tersisa, beliau berdiri dan membacanya, lalu bersujud.'

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that infants used to be brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would supplicate for them. Once an infant was brought that urinated on him, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Pour water over it abundantly.'
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa bayi-bayi biasa dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mendoakan mereka. Suatu kali seorang bayi dibawa dan kencing di atas beliau, maka Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tuangkan air di atasnya dengan banyak.'

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the verses at the end of Surah Al-Baqarah concerning usury were revealed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went out to the mosque and prohibited trade in wine.
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ayat-ayat di akhir Surah Al-Baqarah tentang riba diturunkan, Rasulullah ﷺ keluar ke masjid dan mengharamkan perdagangan khamr.

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'All praise be to Allah whose hearing encompasses all voices. The woman who argued came to the Prophet ﷺ to speak with him while I was in a corner of the house and could not hear what she said, yet Allah revealed: "Indeed, Allah has heard the statement of the one who argues with you concerning her husband."'
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Segala puji bagi Allah yang pendengaran-Nya mencakup semua suara. Wanita yang berdebat itu datang kepada Nabi ﷺ untuk berbicara dengannya sementara aku berada di sudut rumah dan tidak dapat mendengar apa yang dikatakannya, namun Allah menurunkan: "Sesungguhnya Allah telah mendengar perkataan wanita yang mengajukan gugatan kepada kamu tentang suaminya."'

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I fast frequently. Should I fast while traveling?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If you wish, fast; and if you wish, break the fast.'
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku sering berpuasa. Apakah aku harus berpuasa saat dalam perjalanan?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika kamu mau, berpuasalah; dan jika kamu mau, berbukalah.'

28.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Every tribe has its source of support, and the source of support for Quraysh is their freed clients.'
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap suku memiliki sumber dukungannya, dan sumber dukungan Quraisy adalah para bekas budak mereka yang dimerdekakan.'

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We used to prepare nabidh for the Prophet ﷺ in a waterskin: we would take a handful of raisins or a handful of dates and put them in the waterskin, then pour water over them at night and he would drink it during the day, or we would do so during the day and he would drink it at night.'
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami biasa membuat nabidh untuk Nabi ﷺ dalam kantong kulit: kami mengambil segenggam kismis atau segenggam kurma dan memasukkannya ke dalam kantong kulit, kemudian menuangkan air di atasnya di malam hari dan beliau meminumnya di siang hari, atau kami melakukan itu di siang hari dan beliau meminumnya di malam hari.'

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr: 'Bring me a shoulder blade or a tablet so I can write for Abu Bakr a document over which no one will disagree.' When Abd al-Rahman went to get up, he said: 'Allah and the believers refuse that there be any disagreement over you, O Abu Bakr.'
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakr: 'Bawakanku tulang belikat atau papan hingga aku dapat menulis untuk Abu Bakar sebuah dokumen yang tidak akan ada perselisihan tentangnya.' Ketika Abdurrahman hendak berdiri, beliau bersabda: 'Allah dan kaum mukminin menolak bahwa ada perselisihan tentangmu, wahai Abu Bakar.'

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I said: Is it not that Allah said: "Then he will receive an easy reckoning"?' He said: 'That is not the reckoning. That is merely the presentation. Whoever is subjected to a thorough reckoning on the Day of Resurrection will be punished.'
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya: Bukankah Allah berfirman: "Maka ia akan dihisab dengan hisab yang mudah"?' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu bukan hisab. Itu hanyalah pemaparan. Barangsiapa yang diperiksa hisabnya secara terperinci pada Hari Kiamat, ia akan disiksa.'

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade al-dubba, al-hantam, al-naqir, and al-muzaffat [types of containers used for fermenting alcoholic drinks].'
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang al-dubba, al-hantam, al-naqir, dan al-muzaffat [jenis-jenis wadah yang digunakan untuk memfermentasi minuman keras].'

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed witr at the beginning of the night or at the end. She said: 'Sometimes he performed witr at the beginning of the night, and sometimes at the end.' She was also asked whether he recited the Quran aloud or quietly. She said: 'Sometimes he recited aloud and sometimes quietly.'
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan shalat witir di awal malam atau di akhirnya. Ia berkata: 'Terkadang beliau melakukan witir di awal malam, dan terkadang di akhirnya.' Ia juga ditanya apakah beliau membaca Al-Quran dengan keras atau pelan. Ia berkata: 'Terkadang beliau membaca dengan keras dan terkadang pelan.'

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The toothstick purifies the mouth and pleases the Lord.'
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siwak membersihkan mulut dan menyenangkan Tuhan.'

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among the most complete believers in faith are those who have the best character and are the most gentle toward their families.'
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara orang-orang mukmin yang paling sempurna imannya adalah mereka yang paling baik akhlaknya dan paling lembut kepada keluarganya.'

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding marriage: 'If they are consummated, then she receives her dowry for what he has taken from her. And if they dispute, then the authority is the guardian of one who has no guardian.' Ibn Jurayj said: I met al-Zuhri and asked him about this hadith but he did not recognize it.
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai pernikahan: 'Jika telah terjadi hubungan, maka ia mendapat maharnya atas apa yang telah ia ambil darinya. Dan jika mereka berselisih, maka penguasa adalah wali bagi yang tidak memiliki wali.' Ibnu Juraij berkata: Aku bertemu al-Zuhri dan menanyakannya tentang hadits ini namun ia tidak mengenalnya.

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When he sits between her four parts and the two circumcised parts meet, then the ritual bath becomes obligatory.'
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika ia duduk di antara keempat anggota tubuhnya dan dua bagian yang dikhitan bertemu, maka mandi wajib menjadi wajib.'

38.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she washed semen that had gotten onto the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mencuci mani yang mengenai pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ.

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us the choice, and we chose him, and he did not count it as a divorce against us.'
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan, dan kami memilih beliau, dan beliau tidak menghitung itu sebagai talak atas kami.'

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The mattress of the Prophet ﷺ on which he slept at night was made of leather stuffed with palm fiber.'
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kasur Nabi ﷺ yang beliau gunakan untuk tidur di malam hari terbuat dari kulit yang diisi dengan sabut kelapa.'

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited: "It is He who has sent down to you the Book; in it are verses that are precise — they are the foundation of the Book — and others unspecific. As for those in whose hearts is deviation, they will follow that of it which is unspecific, seeking discord and seeking an interpretation. And no one knows its true interpretation except Allah, and those firm in knowledge say: We believe in it. All of it is from our Lord. And none will be reminded except those of understanding." Then he said: 'When you see those who argue about it, they are the ones whom Allah meant, so beware of them.'
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membaca: "Dia-lah yang menurunkan Al-Kitab kepadamu, di antaranya ada ayat-ayat yang muhkamat — itulah pokok-pokok Al-Kitab — dan yang lain mutasyabihat. Orang-orang yang dalam hatinya ada kecenderungan sesat, mereka mengikuti ayat-ayat mutasyabihat darinya, mencari-cari fitnah dan mencari-cari takwilnya. Dan tidak ada yang mengetahui takwilnya kecuali Allah, dan orang-orang yang teguh dalam ilmu berkata: Kami beriman dengannya. Semuanya dari Tuhan kami. Dan tidak ada yang dapat mengambil pelajaran kecuali orang-orang yang berakal." Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Ketika kamu melihat orang-orang yang berdebat tentangnya, mereka adalah orang-orang yang Allah maksud, maka berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka.'

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The one who recites the Quran and is proficient in it will be with the noble and righteous scribes. And the one who recites it but finds it difficult has two rewards.'
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang membaca Al-Quran dan mahir dalam membacanya akan bersama para malaikat yang mulia dan berbakti. Dan orang yang membacanya namun merasa kesulitan mendapat dua pahala.'

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about two companions of the Prophet ﷺ: one who hastened to break the fast and hasten the Maghrib prayer, and another who delayed Maghrib and delayed breaking the fast. She said: 'That is what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do' — referring to hastening to break the fast.
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang dua orang sahabat Nabi ﷺ: satu yang mempercepat berbuka puasa dan mempercepat shalat Maghrib, dan yang lain yang mengakhirkan Maghrib dan mengakhirkan berbuka puasa. Ia berkata: 'Demikianlah yang biasa dilakukan Rasulullah ﷺ' — merujuk pada mempercepat berbuka puasa.

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Prophet ﷺ saying in some of his prayers: 'O Allah, bring me to an easy reckoning.' When he turned away, she said: 'O Prophet of Allah, what is the easy reckoning?' He said: 'That He looks at his record and overlooks it. Whoever is examined thoroughly in his reckoning on that day, O Aisha, will perish. And everything that afflicts a believer, Allah expiates it for him, even a thorn that pricks him.'
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ berdoa dalam sebagian shalatnya: 'Ya Allah, hisablah aku dengan hisab yang mudah.' Ketika beliau berpaling, ia berkata: 'Wahai Nabi Allah, apa itu hisab yang mudah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bahwa Dia melihat catatan amalnya dan memaafkannya. Barangsiapa yang diperiksa secara mendetail dalam hisabnya pada hari itu, wahai Aisyah, ia akan celaka. Dan segala sesuatu yang menimpa seorang mukmin, Allah menghapus dosanya karenanya, bahkan duri yang menusuknya.'

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The best thing I ever saw was him using the toothstick. Then he tried to hand it to me and it fell from his hand. I began supplicating to Allah with the supplication that Jibreel used to make for him, and that he himself would make when ill, but he did not make that supplication during that illness of his. Instead, he raised his gaze to the sky and said: "The Highest Companion, the Highest Companion" — meaning that, and his soul departed. All praise be to Allah who united my saliva with his at the end of the last day of this world.'
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hal terbaik yang pernah aku lihat adalah beliau menggunakan siwak. Kemudian beliau mencoba memberikannya kepadaku dan jatuh dari tangannya. Aku mulai berdoa kepada Allah dengan doa yang biasa Jibril doakan untuknya, dan yang biasa beliau doakan saat sakit, tetapi beliau tidak berdoa dengan doa itu selama sakit terakhirnya itu. Sebaliknya, beliau mengangkat pandangannya ke langit dan berkata: "Teman Tertinggi, Teman Tertinggi" — maksudnya itu, dan ruhnya pergi. Segala puji bagi Allah yang menyatukan air liurku dengan air liurnya di penghujung hari terakhir dunia ini.'

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, after performing the two rak'ahs of Fajr, would lie down on his right side.'
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ, setelah melaksanakan dua rakaat sunnah Fajar, berbaring di sisi kanannya.'

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We had a curtain with the image of a bird on it. When someone entered, they would face it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: "O Aisha, change this, for whenever I enter and see it, it reminds me of this world." He also had a velvet cloth that we said had silk patterns, and we would wear it.'
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami memiliki tirai dengan gambar burung di atasnya. Ketika seseorang masuk, mereka menghadapinya. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadaku: "Wahai Aisyah, gantilah ini, karena setiap kali aku masuk dan melihatnya, itu mengingatkanku pada dunia." Beliau juga memiliki kain beludru yang kami katakan memiliki motif sutra, dan kami mengenakannya.'

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the killing of snakes: 'Those that are in houses, and we are commanded to kill the abtar [a type of snake] and the one with two stripes, for they harm eyesight and cause miscarriage. Whoever leaves them is not from me.'
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai pembunuhan ular: 'Ular-ular yang ada di rumah-rumah, dan kami diperintahkan untuk membunuh al-abtar [sejenis ular] dan yang memiliki dua garis, karena keduanya merusak penglihatan dan menyebabkan keguguran. Barangsiapa yang membiarkannya, ia bukan dari golonganku.'

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ would sometimes say when coming to her: 'We have nothing this morning.' She would say: 'Then I am fasting.' Later he came to her and said: 'We have received a gift; we have kept it for you.' He said: 'What is it?' She said: 'Hays [a sweet dish].' He said: 'I began the morning fasting,' yet he ate.
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ terkadang berkata saat datang kepadanya: 'Kita tidak punya apa-apa pagi ini.' Ia berkata: 'Kalau begitu aku berpuasa.' Kemudian beliau datang kepadanya dan berkata: 'Kita menerima hadiah; kami menyimpannya untukmu.' Beliau berkata: 'Apa itu?' Ia berkata: 'Hays [hidangan manis].' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku memulai pagi dalam keadaan berpuasa,' namun beliau memakannya.

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Congregational prayer surpasses prayer alone by twenty-five degrees.'
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat berjamaah melebihi shalat sendiri sebanyak dua puluh lima derajat.'
